chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1503 of 2011 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of M.A. 6914/2011 For hearing of main case 22.03.2022 Mr. Arbab Ali Hakro advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Aslam Bhatti advocate for respondent No.9. Mr. Ashfaque Nabi Qazi Assistant Attorney General for Pakistan. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri, Assistant AG Sindh. ----- This petition is pending since 2011 with the grievance that at the adjacent land a rice mill has been established. Without prejudice as to the lawful existence of the rice mill comments have been filed by respondent No.4 that the factory has been dismantled in the year 2014 in terms of Para-20. This set the grievances of the petitioner at rest since the factory which is claimed to have been unlawfully constructed has been dismantled. Even otherwise such grievances are of the nature which could not be redressed before this Court in terms of Article 199 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan. At best the tribunal is a forum where such grievances could be redressed. Since the factory has been dismantled this petition has become infructuous otherwise as well. If advised, the petitioner may approach relevant forum as available to them under the law. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
